1.text:
Today felt overwhelming at work. I had multiple deadlines and felt like I couldn't keep up with everything. I kept worrying that my manager might think I'm not performing well enough. Even though I worked hard all day, I still felt behind. 

However, by the evening I managed to finish two important tasks and that gave me a little relief. I know I tried my best today, but I still feel anxious about tomorrow’s workload.
